calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-18-2003 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Valerie Papale. Petitioner, Brindissy Clareth Garcia was sworn and examined through her Spanish Interpreter, Gurard Almendres. The Court notes that the father has not been served notice of the hearing. The Court strongly suggests to the petitioner through her Spanish interpreter, that she consult with an attorney to obtain a Declaration of Paternity from the Family Court prior to changing the minor's name. Also, an amended Petition for Name Change may be filed after consulting with her attorney. Under the circumstances, the Court declines to grant the name change and the petition is denied.
